name: mind-keeper
description: Project-scoped memory MCP for IDE workflows.

scripts.build: npx tsc -p tsconfig.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const src=p.join('src','dashboard');const dst=p.join('dist','dashboard');fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(src))fs.copyFileSync(p.join(src,f),p.join(dst,f));console.log('Dashboard files copied.')"
scripts.android:build: npm run build && cap sync && cap build android
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm test && npm run build && npm run smoke
scripts.release:check: npm run verify && npm run bench:check && npm run bench:suite:check
scripts.bench:project: tsx scripts/benchmark.ts --project-root . --project-query "memory recall branch context decisions session"
scripts.bench:project:record: tsx scripts/benchmark.ts --project-root . --project-query "memory recall branch context decisions session" --out .mindkeeper/manifests/benchmark-latest.json --history-dir .mindkeeper/manifests/benchmark-history
